text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Did someone call my name?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like there's anyone around, but I
still feel like there's someone watching me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Could it be the Three Goddesses statue?!
